evals.prompt: Use bggg-tiktok-readvideo to analyze /tmp/sample-tiktok.mp4. Generate metadata, transcript if possible, scene keyframes, contact_sheet.jpg, timeline.md, and explain the strongest hook candidates with timestamps.
evals.expected_output: A project folder is created under projects/, analysis_manifest.json indexes all artifacts, and the response cites timeline/contact sheet paths plus timestamped hook candidates.
expectations: Runs scripts/analyze_video.py before making claims about video content
Mentions timeline.md, scenes.json, transcript.srt or the reason transcription was skipped

evals.prompt: I have a product QC UGC video. Use bggg-tiktok-readvideo to turn it into a 15-25 second TikTok edit plan focused on QC photos, warehouse inspection, shipping speed, and CTA.
evals.expected_output: The skill instructs Codex to analyze the video context first, then create output/edit_plan.json with source timestamps, hook/proof/CTA labels, and short captions.
expectations: Creates or requests output/edit_plan.json before rendering
Prioritizes hook, proof scenes, and CTA
Keeps TikTok defaults 9:16 1080x1920 and burned captions

evals.prompt: This video has no voiceover. Use bggg-tiktok-readvideo to understand the visual sequence and find the best product shots.
evals.expected_output: The skill still produces visual context with metadata, scenes, keyframes, contact sheet, timeline, and handles missing transcript gracefully.
expectations: Does not fail solely because transcript is missing
Relies on contact_sheet.jpg and keyframes for visual reasoning
States any skipped optional audio/OCR steps clearly

evals.prompt: Batch transcribe every downloaded TikTok video under downloads/tiktok and keep the original language.
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/transcribe_video.py with --recursive, skips existing transcripts unless force is requested, and returns transcript plus transcription_manifest.json paths.
expectations: Uses the standalone transcription script instead of the full visual analysis pipeline
Keeps --language auto by default and does not translate
Mentions transcript paths and the manifest path
